prediction.recommended_action: Review the web application and check for other potential injection attempts.

prediction.label: directory_traversal_attempt

prediction.label: failed_login_bruteforce
prediction.reason: The route contains a repeated TOTP status from the user's IP.

prediction.label: normal
prediction.reason: The file path contains only one word and is expected to be part of the default log file.
prediction.recommended_action: No immediate action required.

samples.raw_prediction: {"label":"normal","severity":"low","is_suspicious":false,"evidence":["../../../../var/log/auth.log","403"],"reason":"The file path contains only one word and is expected to be part of the default log file.","recommended_action":"No immediate action required."}

prediction.label: directory_traversal_attempt
